race.description: Prestige Wedding & Event Hire Maiden Plate
race.comment: BURNING AMBITION (6) strengthened over the break and indicated a win was imminent after he closed late for a narrow second over 1400m at Moree. Will run the trip and expected to get off the mark. RAZOR'S MAGIC (11) improved sharply up on the speed with a gritty third over 1650m at Beaudesert. Will roll forward in a race devoid of speed and can give a ton of cheek. KISS'N DANCE (1) was beaten a head into second at this track two starts ago then appeared at this track last time and finished 4.5 lengths from the winner in fifth. In the mix on best. BOBBIWAA (5) put in not a bad run last start when fourth at Port Macquarie over 1500m, beaten 2.75 lengths. Drawn well and can feature.
